creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
The cmake files installed by this port refers /usr/local/lib/librlottie.so.0.0.1 (in /usr/local/lib/cmake/rlottie/rlottieTargets-minsizerel.cmake).
However, the so installed is actually librlottie.so.0.2.
As a result, if a port tries to use this library, it would not work.

Please check how we can fix this.
